requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——MS/IEC 60335-2-24 家用冰箱
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——MS/IEC 60335-2-24 家用冰箱

summary.en: The refrigerator safety anchor for Myanmar is MS/IEC 60335-2-24, adopted through MSTRD's IEC-based Myanmar Standards process, together with the general household-appliance safety standard. The safety file should cover protection against electric shock, insulation, temperature rise, creepage and clearance, mechanical strength, earthing, cord and plug suitability, markings, instructions, and specific refrigerating-appliance hazards such as flammable R-600a. Myanmar standards are largely voluntary, but safety evidence may be required for certain conformity-documentation categories, customs checks, projects, or buyer acceptance.
summary.zh: 缅甸冰箱安全锚点为 MS/IEC 60335-2-24，该标准通过 MSTRD 的 IEC 基础缅甸标准流程采用，并与家用电器通用安全标准配套使用。安全文件应覆盖防触电、绝缘、温升、爬电距离和电气间隙、机械强度、接地、电源线和插头适配性、标识、说明书，以及可燃 R-600a 等制冷器具特定危险。缅甸标准大多为自愿性，但特定符合性文件类别、海关检查、项目或采购方验收可能要求安全证据。
summary.zht: 緬甸冰箱安全錨點為 MS/IEC 60335-2-24，該標準通過 MSTRD 的 IEC 基礎緬甸標準流程採用，並與家用電器通用安全標準配套使用。安全文件應覆蓋防觸電、絕緣、溫升、爬電距離和電氣間隙、機械強度、接地、電源線和插頭適配性、標識、說明書，以及可燃 R-600a 等製冷器具特定危險。緬甸標準大多為自願性，但特定符合性文件類別、海關檢查、項目或採購方驗收可能要求安全證據。

standards_or_laws: MS/IEC 60335-2-24 — Household and similar electrical appliances safety — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers
MSTRD IEC-based Myanmar Standards adoption process — Ministry of Science and Technology

summary.en: China's common refrigerator baseline is GB 4706.13 for household refrigerating-appliance safety and GB 12021.2 for refrigerator energy performance. GB 4706.13 is the main China safety comparison point for MS/IEC 60335-2-24; however, China CCC files should be reviewed for Myanmar-facing voltage, marking, plug, language, and refrigerant documentation.
summary.zh: 中国冰箱通用基线为 GB 4706.13 家用制冷器具安全及 GB 12021.2 冰箱能效。GB 4706.13 是与 MS/IEC 60335-2-24 对照的主要中国安全依据；但中国 CCC 文件仍应针对缅甸的电压、标识、插头、语言和制冷剂文件进行审查。
summary.zht: 中國冰箱通用基線為 GB 4706.13 家用製冷器具安全及 GB 12021.2 冰箱能效。GB 4706.13 是與 MS/IEC 60335-2-24 對照的主要中國安全依據；但中國 CCC 文件仍應針對緬甸的電壓、標識、插頭、語言和製冷劑文件進行審查。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers
GB 12021.2 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators

gap.en: The technical gap is usually manageable because both sides are IEC-based, but the market-access gap is still real. A China CCC report is not automatically a Myanmar safety acceptance. The exporter should prepare a clause-by-clause MS/IEC 60335-2-24 mapping, confirm 230 V / 50 Hz ratings, update markings and instructions for the importer, and verify whether the customs route or buyer requires MSTRD test or certificate evidence before shipment.
gap.zh: 由于双方均以 IEC 为基础，技术差距通常可控，但市场准入差距仍然存在。中国 CCC 报告不会自动成为缅甸安全认可。出口商应准备逐条 MS/IEC 60335-2-24 对照，确认 230 V / 50 Hz 额定值，为进口商更新标识和说明书，并在出货前核验通关路线或采购方是否要求 MSTRD 检测或证书证据。
gap.zht: 由於雙方均以 IEC 為基礎，技術差距通常可控，但市場准入差距仍然存在。中國 CCC 報告不會自動成為緬甸安全認可。出口商應準備逐條 MS/IEC 60335-2-24 對照，確認 230 V / 50 Hz 額定值，為進口商更新標識和說明書，並在出貨前核驗通關路線或採購方是否要求 MSTRD 檢測或證書證據。

mandatory_status.target: Largely voluntary standard basis, but safety conformity documentation may be required for regulated categories, customs checks, tenders, or buyer acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for covered China domestic refrigerators through GB 4706.13 safety and GB 12021.2 energy requirements

source.publisher: Myanmar Standards and Testing Research Division (MSTRD), Ministry of Science and Technology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use MS/IEC 60335-2-24 as the Myanmar refrigerator safety anchor. China GB 4706.13 evidence is a useful technical bridge, but exporters should remap it for Myanmar, verify 230 V / 50 Hz suitability, and confirm any MSTRD evidence request before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应以 MS/IEC 60335-2-24 作为缅甸冰箱安全锚点。中国 GB 4706.13 证据是有用的技术桥梁，但出口商应将其重新映射为缅甸文件，核验 230 V / 50 Hz 适配性，并在出货前确认任何 MSTRD 证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應以 MS/IEC 60335-2-24 作為緬甸冰箱安全錨點。中國 GB 4706.13 證據是有用的技術橋樑，但出口商應將其重新映射為緬甸文件，核驗 230 V / 50 Hz 適配性，並在出貨前確認任何 MSTRD 證據要求。
